summary: Completed comprehensive testing of SEO and security features: robots.txt, sitemap.xml, SSL badge, and custom error pages (404, 403, 500, offline) - all features working correctly
passed_tests: robots.txt accessible at /robots.txt with correct content
sitemap.xml accessible at /sitemap.xml with proper XML structure
SSL security badge displays at bottom-right with '256-bit Encryption'
404 error page displays for unknown routes with cyber-security theme
500 error page accessible at /500 with server error styling
403 error page accessible at /403 with forbidden access styling
Offline error page accessible at /offline with network error styling
All error pages have 'Return to Base' button that navigates to homepage
Homepage loads correctly with all sections (hero, services, about, contact, footer)
Navigation elements working (logo, services, about, get started)
All CTA buttons present and functional
Contact form elements all present with proper data-testids
SSL badge shows correct content: 'SSL Secured' and '256-bit Encryption'
Error pages show terminal-style error codes with timestamps
Proper React Router setup with catch-all route for 404
